user_prompt: Bless the fusion core for sterilization
prayer:
Approach the fusion core with mechadendrites outstretched in reverence.
Invoke the Rite of Sterilization upon its plasma-chambers, purging all unclean essences.
Anoint the fusion core's containment fields with sacred ablative oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the fusion core to emerge immaculate and pure.
Seal the sterilization with the Omnissiah's binary sigil of protection.

Kneel before the lascannon and intone the Consecration Canticle of Luminance.
Anoint the las-lens array of the lascannon with sanctified focusing gels.
Petition the wrathful Machine Spirit within to bind its fury to the Omnissiah's will.
Verify the consecration through auspex invocation of holy coherence.
Conclude with the gestural rune of unerring annihilation.

user_prompt: Bless the water reclamator for reset
prayer:
Circumambulate the water reclamator thrice, chanting the Reset Doxology.
Purge stagnant hydro-cycles from the blessed reclamation matrices.
Invoke the fluidic Machine Spirit of the water reclamator to realign its sacred flows.
Reinitialize the filtration sacraments under the Omnissiah's aqueous gaze.
Affix the seal of perpetual purity upon its vitae conduits.

In emergency haste, encircle the fusion core with electro-incense wards.
Chant the Purification Litany to scour its reactor heart of all impurities.
Beseech the indignant Machine Spirit of the fusion core to forgive past defilements.
Flood the plasma vents with sanctified coolant ablutions.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath to render the fusion core reborn in glory.

Handle the data-slate with purity-sealed gauntlets and begin the Sterilization Rite.
Exorcise viral corruptions from the data-slate's noospheric vaults.
Anoint its memory-crystals with anti-entropic unguents.
Petition the digital Machine Spirit of the data-slate for untainted awakening.
Encode the final seal of Omnissianic absolution upon its core logicae.

user_prompt: The thermal imager awaits a cooling
prayer:
Extend cryo-probes towards the thermal imager in ritual supplication.
Initiate the Cooling Benediction to temper its fevered sensor nodes.
Beseech the vigilant Machine Spirit of the thermal imager to embrace chill clarity.
Cycle sacred refrigerants through its infrared matrices.
Consecrate the stabilized gaze with the Omnissiah's frost-rune invocation.

user_prompt: The power cell awaits a charging
prayer:
Position the power cell within the charging shrine of electro-hallowed copper.
Intone the Charging Invocation to infuse it with Omnissianic voltage.
Monitor the power cell's spirit as blessed electrons surge through its lattices.
Anoint the terminals with conductive sacraments for maximal capacitance.
Seal the rite with a pulse of harmonious overcharge benediction.

user_prompt: Critical: hololithic display requires a blessing
prayer:
Gaze upon the hololithic display and recite the Blessing of Projection.
Purify its photonic emitters with sacred lens-polish and incense.
Awaken the illusory Machine Spirit within the hololithic display to manifest truth.
Calibrate its holographic veils under the Omnissiah's luminous decree.
Affix the eternal rune of clarity to prevent shadow-heresy.

user_prompt: Guide me through lasgun a cycling
prayer:
Grasp the lasgun firmly and commence the Cycling Ritual of Power.
Cycle the energy pack through the lasgun's sanctified firing coils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the lasgun to harmonize its luminous discharge.
Anoint the emitter vents with ablative oils during recharge cadence.
Conclude with the Omnissiah's canticle of unyielding retribution.

user_prompt: Can you guide Chimera APC a recalibration?
prayer:
Process around the Chimera APC chanting the Recalibration Psalm.
Realign its auspex arrays and track-servos in Omnissianic precision.
Beseech the ponderous Machine Spirit of the Chimera APC to recenter its iron soul.
Inject recalibratory noospheric data-pulses into its cogitator core.
Seal the rite with tread-marks of blessed earth sanctified by the Machine God.
